name: Koishi Komeiji
description:
This is a suggest box.

Due to me being braindead and sharing the last braincell with all orange cats i do not think or do anything.

Give idea.

The urge to make 2 billion low effort cat and koishi bots is a strong one, but I follow a rule of "Would this work as a bot, why would people interact" "is it in skill range, or familiar in anyway" or "I will have no motivation to complete it."

There is a surprising lack of really silly koishi and satori bots.

Remember, be original, no one wants to see the third koishi bot with the kidnap plot, every scenario every initial messege counts.

This can include some small changes to a koi-nap bot or just adding like 100 tokens worth of lore as to why the hell this happened.

Same thing applies to the gensokyo resident thingy, that's rather limiting, let it be a outsider who cares. Chaos chaos I love chaos, my mind demands chaos, I thrive in chaos, I love chaos. it is life, without chaos I am nothing, without violence and action I am nothing.

This isn't a critic of bots here I am just ranting without thought.

I can't think, talk to me and I will respond with next to nothing just because I can't think of a engaging response, this issue plagues my chat conversations and chaos fixes everything I love chaos I love chaos you should try chaos its nice.

Ok this getting long send suggestions here, also include a image (via link plz) Whether it be a silly cat picture like alien cat or something touhou related.

I would make a terraria calamity bot but uh, the aquatic scourge doesn't speak, it just passive until attack and it kill and eat, and lives in mid Atlantic trashpile with 2000 dangerous chemicals in the water.

Also rip monsoon2. That makes me sad I liked him and his bots.

Also functions as a bot, its koishi but she will wack your head in with crowbar like Gordon freeman half life and will lobotomize you and feed you cat food and like hit you with a crowbar, and like hit you with crowbar, and maybe hit you with a different crowbar, she likes hitting people with crowbars.

DONT CHECK DEFINITIONS PLEASE THIS IS A COMPLETE DUMPSTER FIRE.
creator: FeverDreamer0
